svg.title: ISO 27001 Annex A — external influence threat surface map
svg.desc: A structural diagram showing how external influence as a threat vector spans all four ISO 27001 Annex A control domains: A.5 Organizational, A.6 People, A.7 Physical, A.8 Technological. Each domain shows the specific controls activated and the threat entry point it represents.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is external influence as a threat vector under ISO 27001?')

g.text: Collect & act on external influence signals
Protect sensitive info from external actors
Where the threat manifests in space
Stop info exfiltration via influence actors
Limit access granted under influence pressure
